MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jun-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Steve R. Segura, Esq. of Baker & Associates, (818-638-8541), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL, for Joseph Padula, Defendant and moving party.
Julia Wobbe, Esq. of Tobener Law Center, (415-504-2165), for Maria Victoria Lerdo De Tajada, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Both sides submit to the tentative ruling. Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JOSEPH PADULA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Triable issues of fact exist re facts: 7, 9, 10, 11, 13, and 14. No response to additional facts submitted by Plaintiff. No objections to Plaintiffs evidence. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Court Call appearance by Attorney Steve R. Segura of Law Offices of Baker & Associates (818.638.8541) for defendant/moving party

Court hears arguments from both sides. Court rules now as follows:

DEFENDANT JOSEPH PADULA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is argued and continued to JUN-29-2015 at 9:30 in Dept. 501. continuance is contingent upon papers to be filed and served no later than close of business on June 22, 2015. No further pleadings relating to this motion shall be accepted after June 22. notice is waived.
